content:
FIX RENDER AUTO-DEPLOY NOW — IVX

Work only on:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Goal:
Make every push to GitHub main automatically deploy to the correct Render service.

1. Confirm correct repo
REPO: ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1
BRANCH: main
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA:

2. Confirm correct Render service
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_SERVICE_ID:
CONNECTED_REPO:
CONNECTED_BRANCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY_ENABLED:
DEPLOY_HOOK_URL_EXISTS:

3. Fix Render connection
If Render is connected to the wrong repo:
- Disconnect wrong repo
- Connect ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1
- Set branch = main
- Enable auto-deploy on commit

If deploy hook missing:
- Create or load deploy hook
- Save in backend env as RENDER_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL
- Add deploy button to Live Work using this hook

4. Trigger deployment
- Trigger deploy from latest main
- Wait until deploy completes
- Return deploy ID
- Return deployed commit SHA
- Return deploy timestamp

5. Verify production
Check:
- GET /health
- GET /version
- GET /api/ivx/render-status
- Open chat.ivxholding.com
- Verify latest conversation opens automatically

6. Final proof only

REPO:
BRANCH:
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_SERVICE_ID:
CONNECTED_REPO:
CONNECTED_BRANCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY_ENABLED:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
CHAT_LAST_CONVERSATION:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
COMPLETE
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

Do not say COMPLETE unless:
GitHub SHA = Render deployed SHA = /health SHA
and chat latest conversation works live.
